user.title: Connect to FreshTomato Router
user.description:
Enter the connection details for your FreshTomato router.

**HTTP ID**: Find this in your router admin under Administration → Admin Access → HTTP ID, or run `nvram get http_id` via SSH/Telnet.

data_description.http_id: The internal HTTP token used by the Tomato web UI. Find it via SSH: nvram get http_id
data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll the router (minimum 10 seconds recommended)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to router. Check host, port, and network.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid username, password, or HTTP ID.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs.
